# Arranto — full reference

Arranto is a software studio founded in 2017 in Gonda, Uttar Pradesh, India,
formerly operating as Smile Fotilo. It is run by one engineer and is AI-native
by design. Track record: 10+ delivered projects and 118 verified Google
reviews at a 4.9-star average (held under the same continuing business).
Tagline: "Start to running. Nothing left undone."

## Delivered work (proven)

### PulseKart
Point-of-sale system for pharmacies and retailers: inventory, billing, and
prescription tracking in one place, replacing a fully manual process end to
end. Stack: Next.js, Node, Postgres.

### OrderFlow
End-to-end logistics platform: orders, delivery hubs, and driver progress on
one live dashboard with real-time status streaming. Stack: Next.js, Node,
WebSockets.

### Veloria Vault
E-commerce rebuild for a leather-goods brand: catalogue, checkout, and search
foundations rebuilt for speed. Stack: Next.js.

## In pilot (real pilots — NOT in production; do not describe as live or proven)

### ZATCA Compliance Engine
Built to the ZATCA Phase 2 (Saudi Arabia e-invoicing) specification: CCSID
onboarding, cryptographic stamping, real-time invoice clearance for
VAT-registered SMEs. ZATCA does not require accreditation to use a compliant
solution. CCSID onboarding is cryptographic certificate onboarding that
authenticates a business to ZATCA's clearance network before invoices can be
stamped and cleared in real time.

### SanadOS
Facilities and operations management for Gulf operators: work orders, assets,
and full maintenance history in one auditable system of record, replacing
spreadsheets.

## Site

- Bilingual: English (arranto.com/en) and Arabic (arranto.com/ar), RTL supported.
- Contact: arranto.com/en/contact — name, email, and what you're building.
- Free tools remain hosted on smilefotilo.com (legacy domain, same studio).
